$comment: TF-cycle pthread completion witness: the condvar+detach+tightened-create surface test4.c/test_thread.c need. Red-on-disable: remove pthread_cond_init/_wait/_signal/_destroy or pthread_detach from pthread.json -> S0001; loosen pthread_create's 3rd param back to ptr<void> and the bare `worker` (void*(void*)) designator stops matching the fn-ptr param. Deterministic predicate-loop cond handshake: main locks m, creates+detaches worker, cond_waits (releasing m); worker locks m, acc+=n(42), sets ready, signals, unlocks; main re-acquires m, sees ready, unlocks, destroys -> exit==acc==42 every run (a lost signal would hang/exit 0). pthread_cond_t = opaque arr<i64,6>=48B (elf glibc __SIZEOF_PTHREAD_COND_T=48 both arches; macOS 8B __sig + 40 = 48) shipped FLAT. Gated [elf,macho]; the worker must actually RUN + signal on WSL-elf + qemu-arm64. Release shippedPipeline arm witnesses the optimizer keeps the thread handshake (not folded).
